song.title: Amazing Grace (My Chains Are Gone)
song.presentation: V1 V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics: [v1] Amazing grace how sweet the sound That saved a wretch like me I once was lost but now I'm found Was blind but now I see [v2] 'Twas grace that taught my heart to fear And grace my fears relieved How precious did that grace appear The hour I first believed [c] My chains are gone I've been set free My God my Savior has ransomed me And like a flood His mercy reigns Unending love amazing grace [v3] The Lord has promised good to me His word my hope secures He will my shield and portion be As long as life endures [v4] The earth shall soon dissolve like snow The sun forbear to shine But God who called me here below Will be forever mine
